transcript:
All right. Let's get it going. All right. Perfect. Thank you everyone for having me. I'm very excited to be telling you about Xelio and how we're bringing stablecoins to emerging markets.

So, let's look at a... let's look at a problem, right? If anyone here gets paid in stablecoins and lives in a country that does not have the infrastructure that we have in the West, it becomes very hard to use this money in a compliant manner, right? I'm using the example of Nigeria as it is our biggest market. Um, fin... like if you... fintech tools are very, uh, disrupted, meaning that there's no interoperability. If you're getting paid in crypto, you have multiple apps to be able to... to be able to use your... your crypto. It's a very messy process.

Um, we're building the... the op... the financial operating system to essentially, um, fix this problem.

Um, so, you know, a core belief that banking should be accessible to everyone, we launched two flagship products early this year. First was an SMS bank. This allows anyone in the world to have a Solana wallet in their pocket, can transact and make payments without internet required.

After, our users really wanted more features. So we launched the... we launched the... we launched the flagship, um, WhatsApp bank, which essentially allows you to utilize like a... like a proper neobank, everything through WhatsApp.

Um, when I talk about an operating system, it means not only the app, it means everything that goes around it. Being able to make payments, pay your rent, pay your bills, invest, everything in a way that people can access everywhere.

Uh, why now? As you guys know, compliance is getting very friendly towards crypto, especially in these emerging regions, and so now is the perfect time to build. If you were excited about building in crypto five years ago, I'm ve... I have really good news for you for the next five.

Um, again, speaking about an ecosystem, we work with a lot of different partners and companies to be able to provide our users these features and these opportunities.

Um, and I'm actually really excited to announce that, uh, Xelio has partnered with Solstice to bring USX to every single, um, wallet in... in... in the emerging markets. Uh, a new way to save, uh, and it's... you guys should look forward to the announcement. Um, saving will be completely, uh, disrupted.

Um, this... so if you guys want to pre-sign up for the multiplier, go ahead. Uh, it is on a rolling waitlist, so we're going to keep accepting people over the next couple days. Uh, and there is a multiplier on the yield if you start saving with Xelio. Uh, yeah. Thank you guys.

# Xelera secures €1.5 million seed funding led by Hi inov and EIC Fund
4. November 20253. November 2025
[![Xelera secures €1.5 million seed funding led by Hi inov and EIC Fund](https://station-frankfurt.de/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Xelera_Dr.-Felix-Winterstein_-scaled-e1761848497675-1160x560.png "Xelera secures €1.5 million seed funding led by Hi inov and EIC Fund")](https://station-frankfurt.de/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Xelera_Dr.-Felix-Winterstein_-scaled-e1761848497675.png)
Dr. Felix Winterstein, Co-founder and CEO of Xelera (© Xelera)

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?display=popup&u=https://station-frankfurt.de/2025/11/04/xelera-secures-e1-5-million-seed-funding-led-by-hi-inov-and-eic-fund/)[Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Check+out+'Xelera+secures+€1.5+million+seed+funding+led+by+Hi+inov+and+EIC+Fund'+on+Station+website&url=https://station-frankfurt.de/2025/11/04/xelera-secures-e1-5-million-seed-funding-led-by-hi-inov-and-eic-fund/)[linkedin]()[Pinterest]()[Reddit]()[Stumbleupon]()[Tumblr](http://www.tumblr.com/share/link?url=https://station-frankfurt.de/2025/11/04/xelera-secures-e1-5-million-seed-funding-led-by-hi-inov-and-eic-fund/)
****Xelera Technologies raises €1.5 million to accelerate the next generation of AI-ready data centers.**The Darmstadt-based DeepTech startup develops software that boosts the performance and efficiency of data-intensive workloads in cloud and edge environments. Hi Inov led the €1.5 million seed round alongside the**European Innovation Council Fund (EIC Fund)**. The seed funding will enable Xelera to expand its platform, advance SmartNIC-based acceleration, and strengthen its international presence.**
## Strengthening Europe’s digital infrastructure
With this investment, Hi inov reaffirms its strategy to invest early in innovative B2B technologies that strengthen Europe’s digital infrastructure. The fund focuses on SaaS startups with deeply specialized technologies that tackle structural challenges across climate transition, IT efficiency and resilience, the future of work, and AI‑driven innovation.[Xelera](https://www.linkedin.com/company/xelera-technologies/)embodies this approach. As a European deep‑tech company with strong technical expertise and clear use‑case orientation. It has the potential to create long‑term value for critical business processes and position itself as a future market leader. Xelera was founded in 2018 by[Felix Winterstein](https://de.linkedin.com/in/felix-winterstein-7a633b22),[Andrea Suardi](https://it.linkedin.com/in/andreasuardi), and[Alexander Lange](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexander-lange-527522119?miniProfileUrn=urn:li:fs_miniProfile:ACoAAB1xfm8BvfsK68LbFeLpt-3X6tNEQ3nUj-M&lipi=urn:li:page:companies_company_people_index;24c2c8a0-511a-4c63-ae8f-62ed0a57faca)and is headquartered in Darmstadt.
## Accelerating data processing through software-defined acceleration
[Xelera](https://www.linkedin.com/company/xelera-technologies/)develops software that enables organisations to run data-intensive workloads such as AI inference and network functions significantly faster and more efficiently in data centres, in the cloud, and on the edge. Xelera’s platform delivers software-defined acceleration on standar

sources.title: MENLO TIMES
sources.snippet:
top of page

[Helio AI](https://www.helio-ai.com/), an AI-powered recruiting platform with ATS and a gamified personality test, led by [Iako Jikia](https://www.linkedin.com/in/iako-jikia-a62a7bb1/), [Nini Mosiashvili](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nini-mosiashvili-8503398a/), [Natia Kukhilava](https://www.linkedin.com/in/natia-kukhilava-rango-71929516a/), and [Sulkhan Sakhvadze](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sulkhan-sakhvadze/), has secured a $1M seed round led by [SABAH.fund](http://SABAH.fund), joined by [DOMiNO Ventures](https://dominovc.com/), Axiom, [Tetrad VC](https://tetrad.vc/), and Angel investor Bas Godska. The new funding will support global expansion of Helio’s AI Recruiting Agent, enhance product capabilities, and transform hiring processes in fast-growing markets.

Helio AI pairs an intelligent, multilingual recruiting agent with game-based psychometric tests, automating up to 70% of recruiter tasks and speeding accurate hiring for large applicant pools. A $350K pre-seed round helped build its AI platform and secure traction with hundreds of brands across seven emerging-market countries.

In its $1M seed round, investors highlighted Helio AI’s role in addressing a major HR challenge: the manual, repetitive, and biased processes of frontline hiring, particularly in high-turnover industries.

Co-founder and CEO Iako Jikia said, “We’re grateful for the continued trust of our early investors and proud to welcome new partners who share our culture and energy. This round is a key step in scaling Helio globally and amplifying the impact already being created across our markets.”

[SABAH.fund](http://SABAH.fund) Managing Partner Abbas Kazmi said, “Helio AI addresses a systemic challenge in HR, closing the gap in advanced AI recruitment solutions with a team poised to shape the future of hiring.”

Axiom added, “Helio AI tackles one of business’s most persistent and costly problems: understanding human capability beyond the CV.”

Early traction was a key signal for investors of Helio’s product-market fit. Tetrad VC noted, “Helio is expanding internationally, working with major brands, and tackling a critical hiring challenge. Growing month after month without heavy marketing shows the product works and the team knows what they’re doing.”

For DOMiNO Ventures, Helio’s leadership and execution were decisive factors. They said, “Over the past 1.5 years, we’ve seen Helio’s consistency, transparency, and strong execution, reinforcing our belief that the team can build a category-defining company while solving a critical problem.”

Serial angel investor Bas Godska, founder of Acrobator Ventures and early backer of companies like MIRO and Harver, also joined the round, bringing deep expertise in growth, marketing scale-ups, and cross-regional expansion.

With this funding and global investor support, Helio AI is set to accelerate its expansion, scaling its AI Recruiting Agent and delivering faster, fairer, and more intelligent hiring worldwide.

bottom of page

tags.impact_reason: Xelio's focus on bringing stablecoins to emerging markets via SMS and WhatsApp banks introduces accessibility but lacks the scale for a higher score.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose an older-model feature phone as the Semantic Anchor because it directly represents the 'SMS bank' and 'WhatsApp wallet' infrastructure Xelio uses to reach emerging markets like Nigeria. This creates a powerful visual contrast with the complex, glowing crystalline structure that emanates from it, symbolizing the 'institutional yield' from Solstice's USX. For the homepage, I integrated the diegetic text 'YIELD' onto the phone's pixelated screen, resembling an SMS notification, to instantly communicate the core benefit of this financial bridge.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the contrast between the physical and digital. The corner of a worn, plastic feature phone's keypad is visible, with its simple buttons. Just above, a complex, self-illuminating holographic crystal structure emerges from the phone's screen, its intricate facets casting light on the textured plastic below. The focus is on the meeting point of last-mile tech and high-finance.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot, composed for a perfect square aspect ratio (1:1), with central focus and tight framing that fills the entire frame with texture. The image focuses on the profound contrast between the physical and digital realms. The bottom corner of a severely worn, faded plastic feature phone's keypad is prominently visible, showcasing its simple, scuffed buttons. The textured plastic surface exhibits numerous micro-scratches, subtle grime, and softened edges, rendered with realistic subsurface scattering to emphasize its aged state. Directly above, bursting forth from the phone's screen, is a complex, intricately faceted holographic crystal structure. This crystal is self-illuminating, glowing with a soft, vibrant bioluminescent light that emanates from within its depths. Its intricate facets catch and refract this internal glow, casting beautiful, soft bioluminescent highlights, subtle refractions, and ethereal shadows onto the worn plastic of the phone below. The scene starkly emphasizes the meeting point and metaphorical 'conduit' between last-mile technological infrastructure and the abstract world of high-finance. The illumination from the holographic crystal creates a high-contrast scene, with pockets of deep shadow and intensely lit areas, accentuating every minute detail and texture. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, intricate detail, volumetric lighting, shallow depth of field, high contrast, textured, subtle film grain.

editorial.headline: Xelio Integrates Solstice’s USX to Bring Institutional Yield to Emerging Markets
editorial.standfirst: The partnership embeds Solstice Finance's yield-native stablecoin into SMS and WhatsApp wallets, unlocking high-interest savings for users in Nigeria. This move bridges sophisticated DeFi strategies with last-mile fintech infrastructure in the Global South.
key_takeaways: **Strategic Integration:** Xelio has partnered with **Solstice Finance** to deploy **USX**, a Solana-native yield-bearing stablecoin, across its wallet ecosystem.
**Infrastructure Play:** Xelio's "financial operating system" enables users to transact and save via **SMS** and **WhatsApp**, removing the barrier of reliable internet access.
**Market Focus:** The rollout targets Nigeria's fragmented fintech landscape, offering a compliant, interoperable solution for the region's heavy crypto usage.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a move that connects high-level institutional DeFi with last-mile financial inclusion, **Xelio** has announced a strategic partnership with **Solstice Finance** to integrate the **USX** stablecoin into its emerging market infrastructure. The collaboration addresses a critical gap in the Global South: while crypto adoption is high for payments, compliant and interoperable infrastructure for saving and utilizing those assets remains fragmented. By embedding USX—a yield-native asset backed by delta-neutral strategies—Xelio is effectively turning simple chat interfaces into high-yield savings accounts for the unbanked.

The core of Xelio’s value proposition lies in its distribution rails. Recognizing that consistent internet access remains a hurdle in its primary market of Nigeria, the company has built a "financial operating system" that functions entirely via **SMS** and **WhatsApp**. This allows users to hold non-custodial Solana wallets and execute transactions without data connectivity. The integration of Solstice’s USX adds a layer of capital efficiency previously inaccessible to these users, allowing them to earn native yield on their holdings directly through the messaging apps they use daily.

For institutional investors, this partnership represents a significant validation of Solana's ability to service real-world use cases beyond speculative trading. Solstice, backed by **Deus X Capital**, provides the institutional-grade reliability required for such a product, while Xelio provides the distribution network. This synergy transforms the stablecoin from a mere medium of exchange into a wealth-preservation tool in high-inflation economies. Xelio has opened a rolling waitlist for the product, offering a yield multiplier to early adopters, signaling an aggressive push to capture market share in the region's neobanking sector.
